name: Decks + Layer Mixer (VJ A/B)
description: Simple VJ-style two-deck setup: two source decks (A/B) each with their own gain, crossfaded through a compositeTOP layer mixer to a single out. Mirrors what create_decks (N-channel, v0.8.1) + create_layer_mixer build at the tool level. Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; live cook-check UNVERIFIED pending TD run.

nodes.name: deckA_src
nodes.comment: Deck A source (placeholder noise; swap for moviefileinTOP/videodeviceinTOP live).

nodes.name: deckA_gain
nodes.comment: Deck A gain (levelTOP.brightness1 — levelTOP has no 'gain' param).

nodes.name: mixer
nodes.comment: Layer mixer combining the two decks (additive blend; per-deck gain acts as crossfader when driven inversely).

nodes.name: out1
nodes.comment: Final output of the deck mixer.

preview_description: Two source decks (noise + radial ramp) summed through a compositeTOP mixer, with per-deck gain knobs to crossfade between them.
